---
title: 'Anagram: White Noice Esion Etihw'
date: '2014-10-29T17:43:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6665700407957739755'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/anagram-white-noice-esion-etihw.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Ideation'
  - 'White Noise'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">Anagram: A name or label created by transposed letters from another word.  <o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">White Noise - &nbsp;Esion Etihw<o:p></o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-size:12.0pt;font-family:&quot;Georgia&quot;,&quot;serif&quot;">This should be a name for either a person, or maybe the research facility?<o:p></o:p></span></p>  </div>
